Package com.saperion.conversion

Class CreateDocumentInputTypeFromDocumentInfoAdapter

java.lang.Object
com.lexmark.saperion.document.CreateDocumentInputType
com.saperion.conversion.CreateDocumentInputTypeFromDocumentInfoAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.lexmark.saperion.adapter.BeanAdapter<com.lexmark.saperion.document.CreateDocumentInputType>, Serializable
public class CreateDocumentInputTypeFromDocumentInfoAdapter extends com.lexmark.saperion.document.CreateDocumentInputType implements com.lexmark.saperion.adapter.BeanAdapter<com.lexmark.saperion.document.CreateDocumentInputType>
This class converts from DocumentInfo to CreateDocumentInputType.
Author:
jschwarz
